name: p1-bracket-bold-title

expected.title: Base exits on bar closes instead of intrabar extremes
expected.body: The exit logic triggers TP/SL whenever the 1m close crosses the levels, but the strategy should evaluate intrabar high/low extremes.

body:
[P1] **Base exits on bar closes instead of intrabar extremes**

The exit logic triggers TP/SL whenever the 1m close crosses the levels, but the strategy should evaluate intrabar high/low extremes.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.

name: p0-bold-bracket-badge

expected.title: Token refresh can bypass expiry validation
expected.body: Expired sessions remain valid when the token is auto-renewed before the expiry check runs.

body:
**[P0]** Token refresh can bypass expiry validation

Expired sessions remain valid when the token is auto-renewed before the expiry check runs.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
